title: Tilray (TLRY) Q3 Earnings Report Preview
text: Cannabis company Tilray Brands will announce Q3 results this Thursday before market open. The company missed analyst revenue projections by 2% last quarter, posting $224.5 million in revenues—a 2.3% year-over-year decline. Management also disappointed on gross margin estimates and full-year EBITDA guidance. Analysts project 2% year-over-year revenue growth to $204 million this quarter, representing a significant slowdown from the 13.1% growth recorded in the same period last year. Tilray has missed Wall Street's revenue estimates five times over the last two years. Tilray stock has surged 51.8% over the past month, substantially outpacing the consumer staples sector's 4.4% average decline. However, the current share price of $1.70 sits well above analysts' average price target of $0.98, suggesting potential downside risk heading into earnings.
